Text.Page:
I have another request, .

Not long ago, a man named {@LinkCreature:231#1020$$Bettenis} drove his wagon north, intent on making a a fresh start in the wilds. It takes all kinds, I guess.

We haven't heard from him since. By now, he’s got to be as bad off as we are, if not worse. Could you go check on him? We don't have much to spare, but take him a few supplies as well.

Well met! It’s been a while since I had anyone to talk with.

You came to check on me? Ha!

Rest your worries, friend. I'm fine out here. I love the cold."I brought you some supplies."

Beans! Love 'em. Thanks. Now I just need to stoke the fire so I can heat them up.

Do you think could find me some {@LinkCreature:231#1051$$dry grass}? I injured my hand this morning making a "friendly" gesture at those ice "lords."

I don’t need a lot. It shouldn't take long to heat these beans.

Thank you. This stuff comes in handy, let me tell you. Multipurpose, if you know what I mean.

Tell your comrades not to worry about me. Not much shakes me. I've seen it all!

See you around.

He's out of his mind. What’s he doing out there? Stubborn, that one.

We should send someone out to bring him back by force. Not that we need another mouth to feed around here.

Thank you for your efforts.
